cross_scene_arcs.title: From Number to Name: The Birth of Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn transitions from being a dehumanized Stormtrooper (FN-2187) to embracing a personal identity symbolized by the name 'Finn,' culminating in the physical rejection of his armor and adoption of Poe's jacket as a declaration of selfhood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Finn is defined solely by his designation FN-2187 and conditioned loyalty to the First Order.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Finn visibly discards his Stormtrooper identity and adopts symbols of individuality and rebellion.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: While Finn has claimed a name and new appearance, his internal sense of purpose and belonging remains fragile and undefined.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Lie That Binds: Deception and Belonging
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn seeks connection with Rey and the Resistance but undermines it through deception, fabricating his importance and manipulating BB-8 to secure safety, revealing his deep insecurity and fear of exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Finn experiences genuine connection with Rey but is burdened by guilt over his false identity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Finn doubles down on his lie, claiming to be a 'big deal' in the Resistance despite internal anxiety and lack of credibility.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Finn has not confessed his deception, creating a growing rift between his desire for belonging and his dishonesty.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Survivor to Protector: The Emergence of Heroism
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn evolves from a fugitive focused on self-preservation into an active protector, taking initiative in combat, saving Chewbacca, and stabilizing him medically, marking a sustained shift toward responsibility and courage.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Finn's primary goal is personal survival and escape from the First Order.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Finn assumes life-saving roles in combat and medical care, proving his commitment to the group's survival over his own.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite his actions, Finn still struggles with self-doubt and fears being seen as a fraud, indicating incomplete internalization of his heroic role.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Past: Defiance and Reversal of Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn moves from helplessness after losing Poe and being stranded to actively confronting and overpowering Captain Phasma, his former superior, symbolizing his rejection of First Order authority and reclaiming of agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Finn is emotionally shattered, believing Poe dead and left alone in the desert with no support or direction.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Finn captures Captain Phasma, reversing the chain of command and asserting dominance over his past oppressor.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: While Finn defeats Phasma, the broader systemic threat of the First Order remains, and his ability to sustain this defiance under greater pressure is untested.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Love as Catalyst: The Shift to Selfless Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Finn's emotional bond with Rey transforms him from a reluctant participant into a determined rescuer, accepting the burden of Luke's lightsaber and demanding a mission to save her, aligning personal love with galactic resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Finn is entrusted with Luke Skywalker's lightsaber and tasked with finding Rey, though he appears uneasy with the symbolic weight.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Finn insists on a rescue mission before General Leia, framing Rey's survival as non-negotiable, merging personal devotion with strategic action.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Finn's plan to rescue Rey is delayed by military protocol, leaving his emotional drive in tension with institutional priorities.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Smuggler to Reluctant Hero
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han Solo transitions from a detached, self-interested smuggler reclaiming his ship to a committed participant in the galactic struggle, catalyzed by the discovery of BB-8's mission and the return of Luke Skywalker.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Han seeks only to reclaim the Millennium Falcon and avoid involvement in the Resistance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Han fully commits to aiding the Resistance by guiding Rey, Finn, and BB-8 to an ally, embracing his role in the larger conflict.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Han remains emotionally conflicted about his past and hesitant to fully confront his responsibilities.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Weight of Fatherhood and Redemption
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han confronts the painful reality of his son Kylo Ren's fall to the dark side, culminating in a desperate, sacrificial attempt to redeem him—a final act rooted in love and paternal hope.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Han learns that Kylo Ren is his son and is emotionally devastated, yet determined to face him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Han dies in Kylo Ren's arms, believing in his son's redemption even as it appears to fail.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Kylo Ren can be redeemed after killing his father remains uncertain and emotionally unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Crew and Commitment: Building Trust Aboard the Falcon
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Through a series of life-threatening crises aboard the Falcon, Han evolves from a lone operator to a leader who relies on and protects his crew, forging bonds of trust with Rey, Finn, and Chewbacca.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Han attempts to negotiate his way out of danger, still operating as a solitary smuggler.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Han leads a coordinated escape, actively protects Chewbacca, and collaborates with Rey under fire, establishing a functional team dynamic.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term stability of the crew and their ability to survive ongoing pursuit remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Past: From Avoidance to Accountability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Pressured by Maz, the reappearance of the lightsaber, and Rey's disappearance, Han confronts his emotional avoidance, accepts responsibility for his past, and re-enters the fight with renewed purpose.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Han resists involvement, deflecting responsibility and claiming Leia doesn't want to see him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Han actively fights to protect Finn and the group, embracing his role as a leader and warrior in the Resistance cause.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Han has not yet reconciled with Leia or fully processed his guilt over Ben's fall.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Falcon as a Symbol of Return and Resistance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Han's reclamation of the Millennium Falcon marks the beginning of his return to heroism, transforming the ship from a symbol of escape into a vessel of resistance and connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Han reclaims the Falcon primarily to regain control of his life and property.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: The Falcon becomes a hub of Resistance activity, targeted by the First Order and central to the mission of delivering hope and the map to Luke.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The Falcon is damaged and under constant threat, symbolizing the fragility of the hope it carries.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Scavenger to Protector
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey transitions from a survival-driven scavenger on Jakku to an active protector of BB-8 and the Resistance mission, making increasingly bold choices that prioritize purpose over personal gain.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Rey's primary goal is to trade salvaged items for food portions, viewing BB-8 as a potential commodity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey takes command of the Millennium Falcon to escape Jakku, fully committing to the mission and demonstrating leadership under pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her sudden competence and unexplained skills raise questions about her past and latent abilities.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Building Trust Amid Deception
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey forms a fragile but growing bond with Finn, marked by emotional openness and mutual reliance, even as she remains unaware of his deception, creating tension between trust and truth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Rey reveals her name to Finn, marking her first personal disclosure and the beginning of emotional vulnerability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey feels betrayed and isolated when Finn abandons the mission, shaking her faith in their connection despite her continued commitment.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Finn's dishonesty and Rey's emotional investment in their relationship remain a source of instability.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Claiming Agency in a Galaxy of Skeptics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey evolves from an overlooked stowaway to a recognized and essential member of the crew, asserting her competence and earning reluctant respect from Han Solo and the team.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Rey is dismissed by Han Solo and treated as an intruder on the Millennium Falcon.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey is instrumental in repairing and piloting the Falcon, proving her technical mastery and securing her place as a key contributor to the mission.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite her demonstrated skill, her background and origins remain unexplained, leaving her status as an outsider partially intact.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Awakening to Destiny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey confronts the internal and external forces of the Force, moving from passive sensitivity to active resistance as she grapples with her connection to the galaxy's past and her own identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Rey is drawn to Luke's lightsaber by an unconscious, spiritual pull, unaware of her Force sensitivity.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey successfully uses the Force to escape captivity, asserting her will against the First Order and taking control of her fate.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of her powers, her lineage, and the meaning of her visions remain shrouded in mystery.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pull of Belonging vs. Duty
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Rey struggles between her loyalty to her past on Jakku and her growing sense of belonging with the Resistance, ultimately choosing connection over isolation despite lingering emotional wounds.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Rey refuses Han's offer to stay aboard the Falcon, insisting she must return to Jakku out of duty.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Rey is embraced by Leia and welcomed into the Resistance, symbolizing her full integration into a new family and cause.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her grief, unanswered questions about her origins, and the weight of her emerging role remain emotionally unresolved.
